pendingScope: T016 live PostgreSQL migration/seed durability assertions

commands.command: npm test -- tests/server/seed-contract.test.ts tests/server/auth-core.test.ts tests/server/admin-route-policy.test.ts tests/server/plan35-contract-inventory.test.ts tests/server/plan35-error-copy.test.ts tests/server/auth-audit-contract.test.ts tests/ui/admin-accessibility.test.tsx tests/ui/product-components.test.tsx

commands.summary: 48 browser smoke tests passed on the second run; the first attempt timed out after 30 passes because next dev encountered a transient post-build cache error.

commands.command: npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed && npm run db:seed
commands.summary: No DATABASE_URL, Docker CLI, psql CLI, or local PostgreSQL service is available. No live migration or repeat-seed claim is made.

acceptedResiduals.finding: Migration and repeat-seed durability require a disposable live PostgreSQL database.
acceptedResiduals.disposition: Blocks G35-4 closure and all later PLAN-35 phases; T016 remains open.

acceptedResiduals.finding: Full UI route-policy versus page/API guard parity is not executable for all destinations yet.
acceptedResiduals.disposition: Accepted for Foundation because T042/T052 cover the fifteen executable routes and T091 covers the final nineteen-route matrix before activation.
